---
title: "Maria Trench"
---

## Maria Trench

**Dates:** (19 April 1828-20 July 1917)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1883-6)

### Biography

She was the  author of <i>Charles Lowder</i> and <i>Letters and Memorials of Richard Chenevix Trench</i>, sister of Thomas R. F. Cooke Trench, and a cousin of Maria (Trench) Wilson.  Her letters to Bullock (1894-6) in the Bodleian Library are written from Lisanskea, Blackrock, Dublin. [T.R.F. Cooke Trench, <i>A Memoir of the Trench Family</i> 1897; her tombstone Millicent church web]

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 31 [1894]   
- Letter from [February 1885]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
